title: Handwriting Identification System Using Machine Learning
author: R.Deepika
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Recognition is regarded as a basic attribute of human beings, as well as other living organisms. Due to this pandemic situation everything become online, mainly examinations for various domains. So, many of them may try to indulge in malpractice. For that, we came up with a solution, Handwriting Identification System. This text recognition lays emphasis on technique to recognize handwritten English characters. In this method the uploaded handwritten image will go through the steps like pre-processing, feature extraction and finally the classification and recognize the writer with better accuracy.
steps_raw: Recognition is regarded as a basic attribute of human beings, as well as other living organisms. Due to this pandemic situation everything become online, mainly examinations for various domains. So, many of them may try to indulge in malpractice. For that, we came up with a solution, Handwriting Identification System. This text recognition lays emphasis on technique to recognize handwritten English characters. In this method the uploaded handwritten image will go through the steps like pre-processing, feature extraction and finally the classification and recognize the writer with better accuracy.
